offer: For bookkeepers managing 10-20 supplier invoices/month, manual processing causes delays in bookkeeping accuracy. We automate invoice extraction and categorization instead of manual data entry into accounting software.
problem: manual processing of invoices is time-consuming and error-prone
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where bookkeepers seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to bookkeepers with demo video
Community forums where bookkeepers share tools
try_it: Let users try categorization of invoices on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
